---
lang: de
params:
  ReferenceDataFile: NULL
  UnitCodes: NULL
  ReportingPeriodFrom: NULL
  ReportingPeriodTo: NULL
  BirthWeightFrom: NULL
  BirthWeightTo: NULL
  GestationWeeksFrom: NULL
  GestationWeeksTo: NULL
  IncludeNonCorePatients: NULL
---

```{r}
#| label: Initialise Locale
locale <- "de_DE.UTF-8"
sR <- modifyList(
  yaml::read_yaml("../common.de.yaml", handlers = list('bool#no' = function(x) x)),
  yaml::read_yaml("content.de/_sR.yaml", handlers = list('bool#no' = function(x) x))
)
```

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

{{< include content.de/_introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include figures/_fig-bw.qmd >}}

{{< include figures/_fig-ga.qmd >}}

{{< include tables/_tbl-risk-density-rates.qmd >}}
